tweets.text:
Quite the shuffle at North 👇 

Colby McKercher has started in the centre bounce. He’s gotten the move out of the forward line but not back into defence. 

Cam Zurhaar and Zac Fisher are both forward while Riley Hardeman is the beneficiary in defence.
